reconciliation.scope: SEED MANIFEST. Release arc: v0.12.0 through evaluated_commit. The handshake SHAs (evaluated_commit / evaluated_tree / manifest_parent_commit) reflect HEAD at seed-commit time and are PLACEHOLDERS. At release-prep the operator MUST recompute them against the actual release-prep HEAD^, then commit ONLY this manifest file as an immediate-child commit M (so HEAD^ == evaluated_commit == manifest_parent_commit and HEAD^^{tree} == evaluated_tree). Release mode is manifest-authority-only (the RELEASE_DEFER_MANIFEST_AUTHORITY env switch has been retired); the wrapper and CI recheck always read this committed manifest. Until the ceremony completes the manifest MUST NOT be treated as releasable: handshake evaluation will refuse because the SHAs will not match the eventual release-prep HEAD^.

records.summary: P1-LINEAGE-002 deferred coverage (F6/F7) — conditional on a future prune phase.
records.reason: Not part of the current release. Retained for audit with unsupported legacy trigger metadata (the source card's trigger grammar uses a '||' separator, a directory operand, and a non-predicate feature: term, which the strict release-mode predicate parser rejects). Re-evaluate only when a prune phase is pursued or renderstate/seam is touched for deletion logic. The canonical no+disclose+invalid disposition lets the release proceed while disclosing the conditional follow-up and its invalid metadata state.
